nasb.text: The Chaldeans also burned with fire the king’s palace and the houses of the people, and they broke down the walls of Jerusalem.

esv.text: The Chaldeans burned the king’s house and the house of the people, and broke down the walls of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 迦勒底人放火焚燒王宮和民房，又拆毀了耶路撒冷的城牆。

ccb.text: 迦勒底人放火焚烧王宫和民居，拆毁耶路撒冷的城墙。
